pages.title: In Love With The Party
pages.tagline: Sync your soul with the night in this intimate Pop House jou

pages.body: Step into 'In Love With The Party,' a mid-tempo sanctuary where warmth and rhythm collide. This F# major track blends lush synth pads with soft guitar hums to create an atmosphere of pure euphoria, perfect for those seeking nighttime escapism. At its heart lies the enduring connection between two souls syncing their hearts until dawn. As the energy dips gracefully for vocal intimacy before rising again, you'll feel the 808 bassline driving a restrained groove that celebrates life amidst bustling crowds. Every moment is designed to make you fall deeper into the late-night haze, proving that true love can be found even when the drums fade out and only the vinyl crackle remains.
pages.styleSentence: A mid-tempo (129 BPM) F# major track blending warm synth pads and soft guitar hums with a driving yet restrained 808 bassline that creates an intimate club atmosphere where the energy dips gracefully for vocal intimacy before rising again.

pages.text:
We’re in love with the party

Keeping our souls right

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Sings smooth secrets like a hummed melody saved for later.

members.name: BACKING VOX
members.bio: Adds layered depth to every breathy whisper and soaring note.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Pulses with an eighties heartbeat that keeps spirits dancing right.

members.name: BASS
members.bio: Delivers driving yet restrained warmth under the dancefloor floorboards.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Weaves lush pads around vocals like a comforting, glowing blanket.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Sprinkles textures to make every late-night moment feel golden.
